# llms.txt — Project Nexus
# Structured manifest for AI agent and LLM ingestion.
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

# Project
> Nexus: Imported Raw Material Supply Chain Intelligence Hub
> Soybean oil procurement risk minimization via hybrid quantitative + qualitative analysis.
> Outputs: G1 variable importance alerts · G2 price band forecast · G3 Bear/Bull/Hold signal.

## Core Documentation
- README: /README.md
- Agent operating rules: /CLAUDE.md
- Agent memory + failure log: /MEMORY.md
- Sub-agent skill definitions: /Skills.md

## Path-Scoped Rules (load only when relevant)
- Approved libraries (Python + R): /.claude/rules/libraries.md
- G1/G2/G3 modeling protocols: /.claude/rules/modeling.md
- Snowflake + API pipeline patterns: /.claude/rules/data_pipeline.md
- Testing protocol (pytest, great_expectations): /.claude/rules/testing.md

## External References (Approved Data Sources)
- USDA WASDE reports: https://www.usda.gov/oce/commodity/wasde/
- ENSO / El Niño monitor: https://www.cpc.ncep.noaa.gov/products/analysis_monitoring/enso_advisory/
- US EPA Renewable Fuel Standard: https://www.epa.gov/renewable-fuel-standard-program
- Baltic Dry Index: https://www.balticexchange.com/en/data/indices/bdi.html
- FRED (Fed rates, CPI, FX): https://fred.stlouisfed.org/

## Project Scope
- In scope: Soybean oil (대두유) · Origins: US, Argentina, Brazil, Vietnam · CFR basis
- Out of scope: Other raw materials · Autonomous procurement execution · On-premise systems
